meta.title: Fine tuning Optimizations - DoRA, NEFT, LoRA+, Unsloth
meta.description:
➡️ ADVANCED-fine-tuning Repo: https://trelis.com/advanced-fine-tuning-scripts/
➡️ ADVANCED-inference Repo: https://trelis.com/enterprise-server-api-and-inference-guide/

➡️ One-click Fine-tuning & Inference Templates: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/one-click-llms/
➡️ Trelis Newsletter: https://Trelis.Substack.com
➡️ Tip Jar and Discord: https://ko-fi.com/trelisresearch 

VIDEO RESOURCES:
-Slides: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1dcE-PEs5kP5Zr5M2EGyqOoQ2BgUTYfX6LpOhsx4Q9S8/edit?usp=sharing
-DoRA: https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.09353
-LoRA+: https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.12354
-Unsloth: https://github.com/unslothai/unsloth
-NEFT: https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.05914
-Transformers integration: https://huggingface.co/docs/trl/main/en/sft_trainer

TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 Improving on LoRA
0:30 Video Overview

7:12 LoRA Plus

13:02 Notebook Setup and LoRA
23:17 DoRA Notebook Walk-through
25:40 NEFT Notebook Example
26:45 LoRA Plus
30:10 Unsloth
31:18 Final Recommendation
